title: The Kill Switch, The Lone Dissenter, and the Government That Watches You Drive
description: Congress buried a mandate in a 1,100-page infrastructure bill that lets the federal government install kill switches in your car — without your consent. One Republican congressman has voted alone against government overreach more times than almost anyone in modern history. This is his story, and yours.

title: NY Ethics Chair Linked to Corrupt Judge
description: An in-depth look at the troubling connections between New York's ethics oversight chair and a judge embroiled in corruption allegations. We examine the evidence, the institutional failures, and what it means for legal accountability in the state.
